title: At least two killed in Toronto street festival shooting
description: Police have urged the public to stay away from the area.
content:
At least two people have been killed in a shooting at a street festival in Toronto.

title: T. rex fossil could become most expensive dinosaur ever sold
description: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.
content:
In 1997, Sotheby's hosted its first natural history auction selling fossils and other wonders of our prehistoric world.
It was a niche event mostly attended by the world's museums looking for specimens to add to their collections.

title: England 2-1 Norway: Jude Bellingham scores twice as Three Lions reach World Cup semi-final
description: Jude Bellingham scores twice as England beat Norway to reach World Cup semi-final, which you can watch live on BBC One on Wednesday.
content:
At a glance
Andreas Schjelderup gives Norway lead with dipping effort
Jude Bellingham equalises for England in first-half stoppage time
Norway have goal disallowed and hit bar after break

title: Man arrested on suspicion of murder of Ann Widdecombe, police say
description: A 28-year-old white British national has been arrested in South Yorkshire, police say.
content:
Police say a 28-year-old man has been arrested in South Yorkshire on suspicion of the murder of Ann Widdecombe.
"The suspect, who is a white British national, is now in police custody," a statement from Devon and Cornwall police says.
